eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Florida; at 9:56 PM on JUL 3, 2019 Effective until 11:56 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A FLORIDA AMBER ALERT HAS BEEN ISSUED FOR CASEN PAGE A WHITE MALE 5 YEARS OLD 3 FEET 9 INCHES TALL 44 POUNDS BROWN HAIR AND BLUE EYES AND CADEN PAGE A WHITE MALE 7 MONTHS OLD 2 FEET 2 INCHES TALL 28 POUNDS BROWN HAIR AND BROWN EYES. THE CHILDREN WERE LAST SEEN IN THE AREA OF THE 3000 BLOCK OF HIGHWAY 2 IN BONIFAY FLORIDA. THE CHILDREN MAY BE IN THE COMPANY OF JOSEPH PAGE A WHITE MALE 25 YEARS OLD 5 FEET 6 INCHES TALL BROWN HAIR AND BLUE EYES. THEY MAY BE TRAVELING IN A 2014 WHITE FORD ESCAPE FLORIDA TAG NUMBER 0768TW. VEHICLE HAS A FSU TAG ON THE FRONT AND A FSU STICKER ON THE BACK OF VEHICLE. If you have any information on the whereabouts of these children please contact the Holmes County Sheriff's Office at 850-547-3681 or 911. #FLAMBER.
